description: Financial comparison table must contain specific numeric values with year annotations
grading_notes: Revenue figures must be in USD millions with fiscal year. Margins must be expressed as specific percentages. Valuation multiples (P/E, EV/EBITDA) must be exact numbers, not vague ranges.

description: Market TAM must include a year of estimate and a specific USD figure
grading_notes: TAM must be a specific dollar amount (e.g. '$1.2 trillion by 2030') not a vague range. CAGR must be a specific percentage over a named year range (e.g. '15.3% CAGR from 2024 to 2030').

description: All numerical claims must be precise and verifiable
grading_notes: Every number in the report (market size, growth rate, revenue, margin, valuation multiple) must be specific, include units, and reference a time period or as-of date. Approximations like 'around $X' or 'strong growth' are insufficient.
